# Vježba 1 — Uvod u mehaniku fluida {.unnumbered}

Pascalov zakon i Newtonov zakon viskoznosti uvode prijenos tlaka i unutarnje trenje kao dvije temeljne ideje mehanike fluida.

### Teorijski uvod

Mehanika fluida proučava ponašanje tekućina i plinova. Za razliku od krutih tijela, fluidi su tvari koje nemaju stalan oblik i neprestano se deformiraju pod utjecajem i najmanjeg tangencijalnog naprezanja. Ova vježba obrađuje dva temeljna stupa mehanike fluida:

1. **Pascalov zakon:** Tlak narinut u bilo kojoj točki zatvorenog, nestlačivog fluida prenosi se nepromijenjen u svim smjerovima. To je temelj rada hidrauličkih strojeva.
2. **Newtonov zakon viskoznosti:** Definira unutarnje trenje u fluidu. Tangencijalno naprezanje $\tau$ proporcionalno je gradijentu brzine, a faktor proporcionalnosti je dinamička viskoznost $\mu$.

Ispod možete interaktivno istražiti oba principa.
```{=html}
<div id="v1-intro-widget" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f8fbff 0%, #ffffff 100%); border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; border-radius: 22px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 18px 40px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; align-items: flex-start; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 18px;">
        <div>
            <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #64748b; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 6px;">Konceptualni laboratorij</div>
            <h4 style="margin: 0; color: #0f172a; font-size: 1.45rem;">Pascalov tlak i Newtonovo smično naprezanje</h4>
            <p style="margin: 8px 0 0 0; color: #475569; font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.55; max-width: 620px;">Promijeni ulaznu silu, omjer površina, brzinu pomične ploče i viskoznost, pa prati kako se isti fizikalni zakon odmah pretvara u novu sliku tlaka, profil brzine i smično naprezanje.</p>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; gap: 10px;">
            <button type="button" id="btn-pascal" style="padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 999px; border: none; cursor: pointer; background: #2563eb; color: white; font-weight: 700; transition: 0.2s;">Pascalov zakon</button>
            <button type="button" id="btn-newton" style="padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 999px; border: none; cursor: pointer; background: #e2e8f0; color: #475569; font-weight: 700; transition: 0.2s;">Newtonov zakon</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(150px, 1fr)); gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 14px;">
        <div style="background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 12px; padding: 8px 10px;">
            <div style="font-size: 0.68rem; color: #1d4ed8; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase;">Ulazna sila</div>
            <div style="font-size: 1.02rem; color: #1e3a8a; font-weight: 800;"><span id="v1-badge-f1">120</span> N</div>
        </div>
        <div style="background: #eef2ff; border: 1px solid #c7d2fe; border-radius: 12px; padding: 8px 10px;">
            <div style="font-size: 0.68rem; color: #4338ca; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase;">Tlak p</div>
            <div style="font-size: 1.02rem; color: #312e81; font-weight: 800;"><span id="v1-badge-p">1.00</span> MPa</div>
        </div>
        <div style="background: #ecfeff; border: 1px solid #a5f3fc; border-radius: 12px; padding: 8px 10px;">
            <div style="font-size: 0.68rem; color: #0f766e; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase;">Izlazna sila</div>
            <div style="font-size: 1.02rem; color: #115e59; font-weight: 800;"><span id="v1-badge-f2">480</span> N</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 18px;">
        <div style="position: relative; width: 100%; max-width: 520px; margin: 0 auto; background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 72%); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 18px; overflow: hidden;">
            <canvas id="v1-intro-canvas" width="520" height="360" style="display: block; width: 100%; height: auto;"></canvas>
            <div id="v1-scene-caption" style="position: absolute; left: 16px; right: 16px; bottom: 14px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); border: 1px solid #dbeafe; border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; color: #334155; font-size: 0.8rem; line-height: 1.45;"></div>
        </div>

        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; width: 100%;">
            <div id="v1-pascal-panel" style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px;">
                <div style="padding: 16px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 16px;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #1d4ed8; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 10px;">Ulazi sustava</div>
                    <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.86rem; color: #334155; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 6px;">Ulazna sila F₁: <span id="v1-pascal-force-val" style="color: #2563eb;">120</span> N</label>
                    <input id="v1-pascal-force" type="range" min="40" max="240" step="10" value="120" style="width: 100%; margin-bottom: 12px; accent-color: #2563eb;">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; margin-top: -6px; margin-bottom: 10px;"><span>min 40 N</span><span>max 240 N</span></div>

                    <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.86rem; color: #334155; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 6px;">Omjer površina A₂ / A₁: <span id="v1-pascal-ratio-val" style="color: #2563eb;">4.0</span></label>
                    <input id="v1-pascal-ratio" type="range" min="1.5" max="8" step="0.1" value="4" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #2563eb;">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; margin-top: 4px;"><span>min 1.5</span><span>max 8.0</span></div>
                </div>

                <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px;">
                    <div style="padding: 14px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; border-radius: 14px;">
                        <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 4px;">Tlak u ulju</div>
                        <div style="font-size: 1.45rem; font-weight: 800; color: #1d4ed8;"><span id="v1-pascal-pressure">1.00</span> MPa</div>
                    </div>
                    <div style="padding: 14px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; border-radius: 14px;">
                        <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 4px;">Izlazna sila F₂</div>
                        <div style="font-size: 1.45rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f766e;"><span id="v1-pascal-output">480</span> N</div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px; color: #334155;">
                    <div style="font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a; margin-bottom: 6px;">Pouka</div>
                    <p id="v1-pascal-explainer" style="margin: 0; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.5;"></p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div id="v1-newton-panel" style="display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px;">
                <div style="padding: 16px; background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fed7aa; border-radius: 16px;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #c2410c; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 10px;">Ulazi sustava</div>
                    <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.86rem; color: #334155; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 6px;">Brzina gornje ploče: <span id="v1-newton-speed-val" style="color: #ea580c;">1.20</span> m/s</label>
                    <input id="v1-newton-speed" type="range" min="0.2" max="2.4" step="0.1" value="1.2" style="width: 100%; margin-bottom: 12px; accent-color: #ea580c;">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; margin-top: -6px; margin-bottom: 10px;"><span>min 0.2 m/s</span><span>max 2.4 m/s</span></div>

                    <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.86rem; color: #334155; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 6px;">Dinamička viskoznost μ: <span id="v1-newton-mu-val" style="color: #ea580c;">0.35</span> Pa·s</label>
                    <input id="v1-newton-mu" type="range" min="0.05" max="1.2" step="0.05" value="0.35" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #ea580c;">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; margin-top: 4px;"><span>min 0.05 Pa·s</span><span>max 1.20 Pa·s</span></div>
                </div>

                <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px;">
                    <div style="padding: 14px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #fed7aa; border-radius: 14px;">
                        <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 4px;">Gradijent brzine dv/dy</div>
                        <div style="font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: 800; color: #c2410c;"><span id="v1-newton-gradient">48.0</span> s⁻¹</div>
                    </div>
                    <div style="padding: 14px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #fed7aa; border-radius: 14px;">
                        <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 4px;">Smično naprezanje τ</div>
                        <div style="font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: 800; color: #9a3412;"><span id="v1-newton-tau">16.8</span> Pa</div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px; color: #334155;">
                    <div style="font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a; margin-bottom: 6px;">Pouka</div>
                    <p id="v1-newton-explainer" style="margin: 0; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.5;"></p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('v1-intro-canvas');
    if (!canvas) return;

    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const state = {
        tab: 'pascal',
        pascalForce: 120,
        pascalRatio: 4,
        newtonSpeed: 1.2,
        newtonMu: 0.35,
        frame: 0
    };

    const controls = {
        pascalForce: document.getElementById('v1-pascal-force'),
        pascalRatio: document.getElementById('v1-pascal-ratio'),
        newtonSpeed: document.getElementById('v1-newton-speed'),
        newtonMu: document.getElementById('v1-newton-mu')
    };

    const panels = {
        pascal: document.getElementById('v1-pascal-panel'),
        newton: document.getElementById('v1-newton-panel')
    };

    const buttons = {
        pascal: document.getElementById('btn-pascal'),
        newton: document.getElementById('btn-newton')
    };

    const caption = document.getElementById('v1-scene-caption');
    const pascalAreaCm2 = 12;
    const gapMeters = 0.025;

    function setTab(tab) {
        state.tab = tab;
        buttons.pascal.style.background = tab === 'pascal' ? '#2563eb' : '#e2e8f0';
        buttons.pascal.style.color = tab === 'pascal' ? '#ffffff' : '#475569';
        buttons.newton.style.background = tab === 'newton' ? '#ea580c' : '#e2e8f0';
        buttons.newton.style.color = tab === 'newton' ? '#ffffff' : '#475569';
        panels.pascal.style.display = tab === 'pascal' ? 'flex' : 'none';
        panels.newton.style.display = tab === 'newton' ? 'flex' : 'none';
        updateMetrics();
    }

    function updateMetrics() {
        state.pascalForce = parseFloat(controls.pascalForce.value);
        state.pascalRatio = parseFloat(controls.pascalRatio.value);
        state.newtonSpeed = parseFloat(controls.newtonSpeed.value);
        state.newtonMu = parseFloat(controls.newtonMu.value);

        const area1 = pascalAreaCm2 / 10000;
        const pressure = state.pascalForce / area1;
        const force2 = state.pascalForce * state.pascalRatio;

        document.getElementById('v1-pascal-force-val').textContent = state.pascalForce.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('v1-pascal-ratio-val').textContent = state.pascalRatio.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('v1-pascal-pressure').textContent = (pressure / 1e6).toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('v1-pascal-output').textContent = force2.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('v1-badge-f1').textContent = state.pascalForce.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('v1-badge-p').textContent = (pressure / 1e6).toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('v1-badge-f2').textContent = force2.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('v1-pascal-explainer').textContent = `Isti tlak prolazi kroz cijelu zatvorenu tekućinu, pa povećanje omjera površina s ${state.pascalRatio.toFixed(1)} odmah diže izlaznu silu na ${force2.toFixed(0)} N. Ne množi se tlak, nego površina na koju taj tlak djeluje.`;

        const gradient = state.newtonSpeed / gapMeters;
        const tau = state.newtonMu * gradient;

        document.getElementById('v1-newton-speed-val').textContent = state.newtonSpeed.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('v1-newton-mu-val').textContent = state.newtonMu.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('v1-newton-gradient').textContent = gradient.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('v1-newton-tau').textContent = tau.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('v1-newton-explainer').textContent = `Kad gornju ploču ubrzaš na ${state.newtonSpeed.toFixed(2)} m/s, gradijent brzine raste na ${gradient.toFixed(1)} s⁻¹. Ako istodobno raste i μ = ${state.newtonMu.toFixed(2)} Pa·s, slojevi se teže kližu i smično naprezanje skače na ${tau.toFixed(1)} Pa.`;

        caption.innerHTML = state.tab === 'pascal'
            ? `Svaka plava točka prikazuje isti prijenos tlaka kroz ulje. Pritisni manji klip: tlak ostaje isti, ali na većoj površini proizvodi veću silu <strong>F₂</strong>.`
            : `Boja i duljina strelica pokazuju kako brzina raste s udaljenošću od nepomične stijenke. Crvena skala desno prikazuje da veći $\mu$ ili veći $dv/dy$ znače veće smično naprezanje.`;
    }

    function drawPascal() {
        const force = state.pascalForce;
        const ratio = state.pascalRatio;
        const pressure = force / (pascalAreaCm2 / 10000);
        const force2 = force * ratio;
        const pulse = (Math.sin(state.frame * 0.06) + 1) / 2;

        ctx.fillStyle = '#f8fbff';
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const leftX = 88;
        const rightX = 382;
        const baseY = 300;
        const chamberTop = 98;
        const pipeY = 242;
        const leftWidth = 52;
        const rightWidth = 52 + ratio * 12;
        const smallDisp = 10 + pulse * 10;
        const largeDisp = smallDisp / Math.max(ratio, 1.5);
        const fluidAlpha = 0.22 + Math.min(pressure / 2.4e6, 1) * 0.4;

        const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, chamberTop, 0, baseY + 24);
        grad.addColorStop(0, `rgba(56, 189, 248, ${fluidAlpha})`);
        grad.addColorStop(1, `rgba(29, 78, 216, ${fluidAlpha + 0.12})`);
        ctx.fillStyle = grad;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(leftX - leftWidth / 2, chamberTop + 20);
        ctx.lineTo(leftX - leftWidth / 2, baseY);
        ctx.lineTo(rightX + rightWidth / 2, baseY);
        ctx.lineTo(rightX + rightWidth / 2, chamberTop - 10);
        ctx.lineTo(rightX - rightWidth / 2, chamberTop - 10);
        ctx.lineTo(rightX - rightWidth / 2, pipeY);
        ctx.lineTo(leftX + leftWidth / 2, pipeY);
        ctx.lineTo(leftX + leftWidth / 2, chamberTop + 20);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.stroke();

        for (let i = 0; i < 12; i++) {
            const px = 118 + (i % 6) * 58 + (i > 5 ? 18 : 0);
            const py = 148 + Math.floor(i / 6) * 70;
            const radius = 5 + pulse * 2;
            ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(37, 99, 235, ${0.24 + pulse * 0.2})`;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(px, py, radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        }

        ctx.fillStyle = '#334155';
        ctx.fillRect(leftX - leftWidth / 2 + 4, chamberTop + 78 + smallDisp, leftWidth - 8, 14);
        ctx.fillRect(rightX - rightWidth / 2 + 4, chamberTop + 42 - largeDisp, rightWidth - 8, 14);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
        ctx.fillRect(rightX - 36, chamberTop - 58 - largeDisp, 72, 48);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
        ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
        ctx.textAlign = 'center';
        ctx.fillText(`${force2.toFixed(0)} N`, rightX, chamberTop - 29 - largeDisp);

        ctx.textAlign = 'left';
        ctx.font = '12px Inter';
        ctx.fillStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.fillText(`A₁ = ${pascalAreaCm2.toFixed(0)} cm²`, leftX - 34, baseY + 30);
        ctx.fillText(`A₂ = ${(pascalAreaCm2 * ratio).toFixed(0)} cm²`, rightX - 34, baseY + 30);
        ctx.fillText(`p = ${(pressure / 1e6).toFixed(2)} MPa`, 18, 26);

        drawArrow(leftX, chamberTop + 24, leftX, chamberTop + 70 + smallDisp, '#2563eb', 'F₁');
        drawArrow(rightX, chamberTop + 58 - largeDisp, rightX, chamberTop - 22 - largeDisp, '#0f766e', 'F₂');

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
        ctx.setLineDash([6, 5]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(208, 82);
        ctx.lineTo(208, 314);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#64748b';
        ctx.fillText('isti tlak u zatvorenom ulju', 224, 90);
    }

    function drawNewton() {
        const speed = state.newtonSpeed;
        const mu = state.newtonMu;
        const gradient = speed / gapMeters;
        const tau = mu * gradient;
        const pulse = (Math.sin(state.frame * 0.05) + 1) / 2;
        const left = 68;
        const top = 82;
        const width = 320;
        const height = 190;
        const layers = 7;

        ctx.fillStyle = '#fffaf5';
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const fluidGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(left, top, left, top + height);
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(251, 146, 60, 0.24)');
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.08)');
        ctx.fillStyle = fluidGrad;
        ctx.fillRect(left, top, width, height);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#1f2937';
        ctx.fillRect(left, top - 20, width, 18);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.fillRect(left, top + height, width, 16);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#9a3412';
        ctx.font = '12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText(`gornja ploča: ${speed.toFixed(2)} m/s`, left + 8, top - 30);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.fillText('donja ploča: v = 0', left + 8, top + height + 34);

        for (let i = 0; i <= layers; i++) {
            const t = i / layers;
            const y = top + height - t * height;
            const localSpeed = t * speed;
            const arrowLen = 34 + localSpeed * 70;
            const hue = 205 - t * 42;
            ctx.strokeStyle = `hsl(${hue}, 78%, 48%)`;
            ctx.lineWidth = 2 + t * 2.2;
            drawArrow(left + 30, y, left + 30 + arrowLen, y, ctx.strokeStyle, i === layers ? 'vmax' : '');
            ctx.fillStyle = '#64748b';
            ctx.font = '11px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(`${localSpeed.toFixed(2)} m/s`, left + 44 + arrowLen, y + 4);
        }

        for (let i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
            const row = i % 6;
            const col = Math.floor(i / 6);
            const y = top + 20 + row * 28;
            const localT = 1 - ((y - top) / height);
            const particleSpeed = 0.8 + localT * speed * 2.4;
            const x = left + 14 + ((col * 58 + state.frame * particleSpeed * 2) % (width - 28));
            ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(249, 115, 22, ${0.22 + localT * 0.4})`;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(x, y, 2.8, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        }

        const barX = 430;
        const barTop = 94;
        const barHeight = 176;
        const stressRatio = Math.min(tau / 55, 1);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#fee2e2';
        ctx.fillRect(barX, barTop, 42, barHeight);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#dc2626';
        ctx.fillRect(barX, barTop + (1 - stressRatio) * barHeight, 42, stressRatio * barHeight);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#fecaca';
        ctx.strokeRect(barX, barTop, 42, barHeight);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#7f1d1d';
        ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('τ', barX + 15, barTop - 8);
        ctx.fillText(`${tau.toFixed(1)} Pa`, barX - 6, barTop + barHeight + 18);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#fb923c';
        ctx.setLineDash([7, 5]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(left + 18, top + height + 2);
        ctx.lineTo(left + 18 + 190, top + height - 160);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#9a3412';
        ctx.fillText(`dv/dy = ${gradient.toFixed(1)} s⁻¹`, left + 208, top + 24);
        ctx.fillText(`μ = ${mu.toFixed(2)} Pa·s`, left + 208, top + 44);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#b91c1c';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        drawArrow(barX - 18, top - 10 - pulse * 3, barX - 18, top + 24 + pulse * 5, '#b91c1c', 'τ');
    }

    function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
        const headlen = 10;
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.fillStyle = color;
        ctx.lineWidth = Math.max(ctx.lineWidth || 2, 2);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
        ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();
        if (label) {
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(label, x2 + (x2 >= x1 ? 8 : -28), y2 - 6);
        }
    }

    function animate() {
        state.frame += 1;
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        if (state.tab === 'pascal') drawPascal();
        else drawNewton();
        requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    }

    buttons.pascal.addEventListener('click', () => setTab('pascal'));
    buttons.newton.addEventListener('click', () => setTab('newton'));
    Object.values(controls).forEach((input) => input.addEventListener('input', updateMetrics));

    updateMetrics();
    setTab('pascal');
    animate();
})();
</script>
````
```{=html}
<div class="mf1-note-grid">
    <div class="mf1-kriterij">
        <h4>Kriterij primjene</h4>
        <ul>
            <li>Pascalov zakon primjenjujte kada je fluid u mirovanju i traži se prijenos tlaka ili sile kroz zatvoreni sustav.</li>
            <li>Newtonov zakon viskoznosti primjenjujte kada postoji gradijent brzine i treba povezati tangencijalno naprezanje s deformacijom strujanja.</li>
        </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="mf1-warning">
        <h4>Česta pogreška</h4>
        <p>Nemoj miješati tlak i silu: tlak se kroz fluid prenosi jednak, ali sila uvijek ovisi o površini na koju taj tlak djeluje.</p>
    </div>
</div>
```


<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Zadatak 1 — Težina klipa i manometarski tlak {.unnumbered}

(2500 SPFM – 2.53) Za sustav na slici potrebno je odrediti težinu klipa kada manometarsko
očitanje tlaka iznosi 70,0 kPa. U sustavu se nalazi ulje gustoće $\rho = 860$ kg/m³.
Klip je promjera $d_k = 1$ m.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$p_m = 70{,}0\ \text{kPa}$, $\rho = 860\ \text{kg/m}^3$, $d_k = 1\ \text{m}$, $h = 1\ \text{m}$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">a) $G$; b) visina klipa $h_k$ za $\rho_{Fe} = 7870\ \text{kg/m}^3$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

1. **Površina klipa:** $A_k = \pi d_k^2/4 = \pi \cdot 1^2/4 = 0{,}785\ \text{m}^2$
2. **Tlak pod klipom** (manometar mjeri na visini $h$ iznad dna, pa se dodaje hidrostatski stupac):
$$p_k = p_m + \rho g h = 70\,000 + 860 \cdot 9{,}81 \cdot 1 = 78\,437\ \text{Pa}$$
3. **Težina klipa:**
$$G = p_k \cdot A_k = 78\,437 \cdot 0{,}785 = 61\,603\ \text{N}$$
4. **Visina klipa (b):** $m_k = G/g = 6280\ \text{kg}$; $\quad h_k = m_k/(A_k \cdot \rho_{Fe}) = 6280/(0{,}785 \cdot 7870) = 1{,}01\ \text{m}$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

`
````{=html}
<div id="z2-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; padding: 22px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 18px;">
        <div>
            <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #64748b; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 6px;">Z2 laboratorij tlaka</div>
            <h4 style="margin: 0; color: #0f172a; font-size: 1.42rem;">Klip i manometar: tlak pod klipom minus hidrostatski pad</h4>
            <p style="margin: 8px 0 0 0; color: #475569; font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.55; max-width: 620px;">Ovaj widget više ne prikazuje samo očitanje manometra. Sada se odvojeno vidi tlak koji stvara težina klipa i tlak koji se "potroši" penjanjem kroz stupac ulja do manometra.</p>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(320px, 1.1fr) 1fr; gap: 14px; align-items: start;">
        <div style="position: relative; background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 72%); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 18px; overflow: hidden; min-height: 430px;">
            <svg id="z2-svg" viewBox="0 0 540 430" style="width: 100%; height: auto; display:block;">
                <defs>
                    <linearGradient id="z2-oil-grad" x1="0" x2="0" y1="0" y2="1">
                        <stop id="z2-oil-stop1" offset="0%" stop-color="#f59e0b" stop-opacity="0.28"></stop>
                        <stop id="z2-oil-stop2" offset="100%" stop-color="#ea580c" stop-opacity="0.52"></stop>
                    </linearGradient>
                </defs>
                <rect x="120" y="72" width="120" height="260" fill="url(#z2-oil-grad)" stroke="#64748b" stroke-width="3"></rect>
                <rect id="z2-piston" x="112" y="56" width="136" height="18" fill="#334155"></rect>
                <rect id="z2-weight" x="146" y="18" width="68" height="38" fill="#0f172a" rx="4"></rect>
                <text id="z2-weight-text" x="180" y="43" font-size="13" text-anchor="middle" fill="#fff" font-weight="700">61.6 kN</text>
                <path d="M240 290 L360 290 L360 180" fill="none" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round"></path>
                <path id="z2-h-guide" d="M366 290 L366 180" fill="none" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="6 5"></path>
                <text id="z2-h-label" x="374" y="236" font-size="12" fill="#475569">h = 1.0 m</text>
                <circle cx="430" cy="182" r="58" fill="#fff" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="3"></circle>
                <line x1="430" y1="182" x2="430" y2="132" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="2"></line>
                <line x1="430" y1="182" x2="468" y2="214" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="2"></line>
                <line x1="430" y1="182" x2="392" y2="214" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="2"></line>
                <line id="z2-needle" x1="430" y1="182" x2="470" y2="170" stroke="#dc2626" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"></line>
                <circle cx="430" cy="182" r="5" fill="#dc2626"></circle>
                <text x="430" y="252" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#334155">manometar pₘ</text>
                <text x="18" y="30" font-size="12" fill="#64748b">Klip stvara G/A, stupac ulja oduzima ρgh.</text>
            </svg>
            <div style="position:absolute; top:10px; left:10px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.92); border:1px solid #dbeafe; border-radius:10px; padding:7px 10px; font-size:0.77rem; color:#334155;">
                Očitanje manometra: <span id="z2-res-pm-top" style="font-weight:800; color:#dc2626;">70.0</span> kPa
            </div>
        </div>

        <div style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:10px;">
            <div style="background: #f8fafc; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 14px;">
                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; color:#475569; margin-bottom:6px;">Gustoća ulja ρ: <span id="z2-v-rho" style="color:#2563eb;">860</span> kg/m³</label>
                <input type="range" id="z2-rho" min="700" max="1000" step="10" value="860" style="width:100%; accent-color:#2563eb;">
                <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; font-size:0.72rem; color:#64748b; margin:2px 0 8px;"><span>700</span><span>1000</span></div>

                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; color:#475569; margin-bottom:6px;">Visinska razlika h: <span id="z2-v-h" style="color:#0f766e;">1.0</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="z2-h" min="0" max="3" step="0.1" value="1.0" style="width:100%; accent-color:#0f766e;">
                <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; font-size:0.72rem; color:#64748b; margin:2px 0 8px;"><span>0.0</span><span>3.0</span></div>

                <label style="display:block; font-weight:700; color:#475569; margin-bottom:6px;">Dodatni teret: <span id="z2-v-extra" style="color:#ea580c;">0</span> kN</label>
                <input type="range" id="z2-extra" min="0" max="80" step="10" value="0" style="width:100%; accent-color:#ea580c;">
                <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; font-size:0.72rem; color:#64748b; margin-top:2px;"><span>0</span><span>80</span></div>
            </div>

            <div style="background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:14px; padding:12px;">
                <div style="font-size:0.72rem; color:#64748b; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:8px;">Bilanca tlaka (horizontalni stupci)</div>
                <div style="font-size:0.78rem; color:#1d4ed8; margin-bottom:4px;">$G/A$ = <span id="z2-res-piston">78.4</span> kPa</div>
                <div style="height:12px; background:#e2e8f0; border-radius:999px; overflow:hidden; margin-bottom:8px;"><div id="z2-bar-p" style="height:100%; width:0%; background:#2563eb;"></div></div>
                <div style="font-size:0.78rem; color:#c2410c; margin-bottom:4px;">$-\rho g h$ = -<span id="z2-res-hydro">8.4</span> kPa</div>
                <div style="height:12px; background:#e2e8f0; border-radius:999px; overflow:hidden; margin-bottom:8px;"><div id="z2-bar-h" style="height:100%; width:0%; background:#f59e0b;"></div></div>
                <div style="font-size:0.78rem; color:#166534; margin-bottom:4px;">$p_m$ = <span id="z2-res-pm">70.0</span> kPa</div>
                <div style="height:12px; background:#e2e8f0; border-radius:999px; overflow:hidden;"><div id="z2-bar-m" style="height:100%; width:0%; background:#22c55e;"></div></div>
            </div>

            <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:10px;">
                <div style="background:#eef2ff; border:1px solid #c7d2fe; border-radius:12px; padding:10px;">
                    <div style="font-size:0.68rem; color:#4338ca; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase;">Težina klipa</div>
                    <div style="font-size:1.1rem; color:#3730a3; font-weight:800;"><span id="z2-res-g">61.6</span> kN</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background:#fff7ed; border:1px solid #fdba74; border-radius:12px; padding:10px; color:#7c2d12;">
                    <div style="font-size:0.68rem; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase;">Numerička bilanca</div>
                    <div style="font-size:0.78rem;" id="z2-eq-vals">...</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="padding: 12px 14px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 14px; color: #334155;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a; margin-bottom: 6px;">Pouka</div>
                <p id="z2-explainer" style="margin: 0; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.55;"></p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
Manometar ne očitava direktno tlak pod klipom. On očitava tlak na svojoj visini, pa je zato potrebno od tlaka pod klipom oduzeti hidrostatski pad kroz stupac ulja do mjesta mjerenja.
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const rhoS = document.getElementById('z2-rho');
    const hS = document.getElementById('z2-h');
    const extraS = document.getElementById('z2-extra');
    const pistonEl = document.getElementById('z2-piston');
    const weightEl = document.getElementById('z2-weight');
    const weightTextEl = document.getElementById('z2-weight-text');
    const needleEl = document.getElementById('z2-needle');
    const hGuideEl = document.getElementById('z2-h-guide');
    const hLabelEl = document.getElementById('z2-h-label');
    const oilStop1 = document.getElementById('z2-oil-stop1');
    const oilStop2 = document.getElementById('z2-oil-stop2');

    function getValues() {
        const rho = parseFloat(rhoS.value);
        const h = parseFloat(hS.value);
        const extraLoad = parseFloat(extraS.value) * 1000;
        const Ak = Math.PI / 4;
        const g = 9.81;
        const baseG = 61603;
        const currentG = baseG + extraLoad;
        const pistonPressure = currentG / Ak / 1000;
        const hydroDrop = rho * g * h / 1000;
        const pm = pistonPressure - hydroDrop;

        return { rho, h, extraLoad, Ak, g, currentG, pistonPressure, hydroDrop, pm };
    }

    function update() {
        const values = getValues();

        document.getElementById('z2-v-rho').textContent = values.rho.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('z2-v-h').textContent = values.h.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z2-v-extra').textContent = (values.extraLoad / 1000).toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('z2-res-piston').textContent = values.pistonPressure.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z2-res-hydro').textContent = values.hydroDrop.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z2-res-pm').textContent = values.pm.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z2-res-pm-top').textContent = values.pm.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z2-res-g').textContent = (values.currentG / 1000).toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z2-eq-vals').textContent = `${values.pm.toFixed(1)} kPa = ${values.pistonPressure.toFixed(1)} kPa - ${values.hydroDrop.toFixed(1)} kPa`;
        document.getElementById('z2-explainer').textContent = `Klip trenutačno stvara ${values.pistonPressure.toFixed(1)} kPa na dnu cilindra, ali se do manometra izgubi ${values.hydroDrop.toFixed(1)} kPa zbog penjanja kroz stupac ulja visine ${values.h.toFixed(1)} m. Zato instrument pokazuje ${values.pm.toFixed(1)} kPa, a ne puni tlak pod klipom.`;

        const pRatio = Math.min(values.pistonPressure / 120, 1);
        const hRatio = Math.min(values.hydroDrop / 35, 1);
        const mRatio = Math.min(values.pm / 120, 1);
        document.getElementById('z2-bar-p').style.width = `${(pRatio * 100).toFixed(1)}%`;
        document.getElementById('z2-bar-h').style.width = `${(hRatio * 100).toFixed(1)}%`;
        document.getElementById('z2-bar-m').style.width = `${(mRatio * 100).toFixed(1)}%`;

        const pistonDrop = Math.min((values.currentG / 1000) * 0.12, 16);
        pistonEl.setAttribute('y', (56 + pistonDrop).toFixed(1));
        weightEl.setAttribute('y', (18 + pistonDrop).toFixed(1));
        weightTextEl.setAttribute('y', (43 + pistonDrop).toFixed(1));
        weightTextEl.textContent = `${(values.currentG / 1000).toFixed(1)} kN`;

        const gaugeY = 290 - values.h * 36;
        hGuideEl.setAttribute('d', `M366 290 L366 ${gaugeY.toFixed(1)}`);
        hLabelEl.setAttribute('y', ((290 + gaugeY) / 2).toFixed(1));
        hLabelEl.textContent = `h = ${values.h.toFixed(1)} m`;

        const angle = -60 + Math.min(Math.max(values.pm, 0), 120) / 120 * 120;
        needleEl.setAttribute('transform', `rotate(${angle.toFixed(2)} 430 182)`);

        const cTop = 0.16 + (values.rho - 700) / 300 * 0.24;
        const cBot = 0.32 + (values.rho - 700) / 300 * 0.28;
        oilStop1.setAttribute('stop-opacity', cTop.toFixed(3));
        oilStop2.setAttribute('stop-opacity', cBot.toFixed(3));
    }

    [rhoS, hS, extraS].forEach((slider) => slider.addEventListener('input', update));
    update();
})();
</script>
````

<br>

<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Zadatak 2 — Modul stlačivosti tekućine {.unnumbered}

(2500 SPFM – 1.25) Tekućina stlačena u cilindru zauzima početni volumen od 1000 cm³ pri
tlaku od 1 MPa, dok pri tlaku od 2 MPa zauzima volumen od 995 cm³. Potrebno je odrediti
modul stlačivosti tekućine.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$V_1 = 1000\ \text{cm}^3$, $p_1 = 1\ \text{MPa}$, $V_2 = 995\ \text{cm}^3$, $p_2 = 2\ \text{MPa}$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">modul stlačivosti $E$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

1. **Definicija:** $E = -\Delta p\,/\,(\Delta V/V_1)$
2. **Uvrštavanje:**
$$E = -\frac{\Delta p}{\Delta V/V_1} = -\frac{(2-1)\cdot 10^6}{(995-1000)/1000} = 200\ \text{MPa}$$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

`
````{=html}
<div id="z4-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 980px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; padding: 22px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fbff 100%); border: 1px solid #dbe7f3; border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);">
    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 18px;">
        <div>
            <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #64748b; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 6px;">Z4 laboratorij stlačivosti</div>
            <h4 style="margin: 0; color: #0f172a; font-size: 1.42rem;">Isti tlak, potpuno drugačiji odgovor tekućine i plina</h4>
            <p style="margin: 8px 0 0 0; color: #475569; font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.55; max-width: 620px;">Widget sada izravno uspoređuje kako isti rast tlaka jedva smanji volumen vode, dok plin pri istom opterećenju vidljivo kolabira. Time modul stlačivosti više nije apstraktan broj nego mjera “krutosti volumena”.</p>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr)); gap: 18px; align-items: stretch;">
        <div style="position: relative; background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 72%); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 18px; min-height: 320px; overflow: hidden;">
            <canvas id="z4-canvas" width="540" height="320" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            <div style="position: absolute; top: 12px; left: 12px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); border: 1px solid #dbeafe; border-radius: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 0.78rem; color: #334155;">
                Tlak: <span id="z4-v-p" style="font-weight: 800; color: #2563eb;">1</span> MPa
            </div>
            <div style="position: absolute; top: 12px; right: 12px; background: rgba(15,23,42,0.9); color: #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 0.73rem; line-height: 1.45; max-width: 185px;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; color: #93c5fd; margin-bottom: 4px;">Ključna ideja</div>
                <div>Velik <strong>E</strong> znači da treba puno tlaka za malu promjenu volumena.</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; font-size: 0.85rem;">
            <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; color: #475569; margin-bottom: 6px;">Tlak p: <span id="z4-v-p-side" style="color: #2563eb;">1.0</span> MPa</label>
                <div style="font-size:0.78rem; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:6px;">Δp u odnosu na 1 MPa: <strong id="z4-dp" style="color:#1d4ed8;">0.0</strong> MPa</div>
                <input type="range" id="z4-p" min="1" max="10" step="0.1" value="1" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #2563eb;">
                <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:0.72rem;color:#64748b;margin-top:3px;"><span>1 MPa</span><span>10 MPa</span></div>
            </div>
            
            <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.74rem; font-weight: 800; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 10px; text-transform: uppercase;">Relativna promjena volumena</div>
                <div style="display: grid; gap: 10px;">
                    <div>
                        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-bottom: 4px;"><span style="color: #2563eb;">Voda</span><strong id="z4-val-liquid" style="color: #1d4ed8;">0.04%</strong></div>
                        <div style="height: 10px; background: #e2e8f0; border-radius: 999px; overflow: hidden;"><div id="z4-bar-liquid" style="width: 0%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #60a5fa, #2563eb);"></div></div>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-bottom: 4px;"><span style="color: #dc2626;">Zrak</span><strong id="z4-val-gas" style="color: #b91c1c;">90%</strong></div>
                        <div style="height: 10px; background: #e2e8f0; border-radius: 999px; overflow: hidden;"><div id="z4-bar-gas" style="width: 0%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #fca5a5, #ef4444);"></div></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px;">
                <div style="background: #eff6ff; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 14px;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #1d4ed8; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Volumen vode</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 800; color: #1d4ed8;"><span id="z4-vol-liquid">999.6</span> cm³</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #fff5f5; padding: 14px; border: 1px solid #fecaca; border-radius: 14px;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #b91c1c; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Volumen zraka</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 800; color: #b91c1c;"><span id="z4-vol-gas">100.0</span> cm³</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px; color: #334155;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a; margin-bottom: 6px;">Pouka</div>
                <p id="z4-explainer" style="margin: 0; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.55;"></p>
            </div>

            <div style="background:#ffffff; padding:12px 14px; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:16px;">
                <div style="font-size:0.72rem; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:8px;">Log-usporedba modula stlačivosti E</div>
                <div style="font-size:0.8rem; color:#1d4ed8; margin-bottom:3px;">Voda ~ 2000 MPa</div>
                <div style="height:10px; background:#e2e8f0; border-radius:999px; overflow:hidden; margin-bottom:8px;"><div style="height:100%; width:100%; background:linear-gradient(90deg,#60a5fa,#1d4ed8);"></div></div>
                <div style="font-size:0.8rem; color:#b91c1c; margin-bottom:3px;">Zrak ~ 0.1 MPa</div>
                <div style="height:10px; background:#e2e8f0; border-radius:999px; overflow:hidden;"><div style="height:100%; width:6%; background:linear-gradient(90deg,#fca5a5,#ef4444);"></div></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
Modul stlačivosti nije samo broj u formuli. On određuje koliko se gornji klip mora spustiti da bi volumen stvarno pao. Kod tekućine je taj pomak jedva vidljiv, dok je kod plina dramatičan.
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const z4c = document.getElementById('z4-canvas');
    const z4ctx = z4c.getContext('2d');
    const z4pS = document.getElementById('z4-p');

    let liquidParticles = Array.from({ length: 70 }, () => ({
        x: 40 + Math.random() * 170,
        y: 110 + Math.random() * 150,
        vx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5,
        vy: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5
    }));
    let gasParticles = Array.from({ length: 42 }, () => ({
        x: 320 + Math.random() * 150,
        y: 90 + Math.random() * 170,
        vx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2.5,
        vy: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2.5
    }));
    let frame = 0;

    function updateZ4() {
        const p = parseFloat(z4pS.value);
        document.getElementById('z4-v-p').textContent = p.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z4-v-p-side').textContent = p.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z4-dp').textContent = (p - 1).toFixed(1);

        const dP = Math.max(p - 1, 0);
        const liquidCompression = Math.max(0, (dP / 2000) * 100);
        const gasCompression = Math.min((1 - 1 / Math.max(p, 1)) * 100, 90);
        const liquidVolume = 1000 * (1 - liquidCompression / 100);
        const gasVolume = 1000 * (1 - gasCompression / 100);

        document.getElementById('z4-bar-liquid').style.width = `${Math.min(liquidCompression * 300, 100)}%`;
        document.getElementById('z4-val-liquid').textContent = `${liquidCompression.toFixed(2)}%`;
        document.getElementById('z4-bar-gas').style.width = `${gasCompression.toFixed(1)}%`;
        document.getElementById('z4-val-gas').textContent = `${gasCompression.toFixed(1)}%`;
        document.getElementById('z4-vol-liquid').textContent = liquidVolume.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z4-vol-gas').textContent = gasVolume.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z4-explainer').textContent = `Na ${p.toFixed(0)} MPa voda izgubi tek ${liquidCompression.toFixed(2)}% volumena, pa njezin klip gotovo da se ne pomakne. Plin pri istom opterećenju izgubi oko ${gasCompression.toFixed(1)}% volumena, zato se ondje vidi veliko skupljanje i mnogo veća promjena rasporeda čestica.`;

        draw(liquidCompression, gasCompression, p);
    }

    function draw(liqComp, gasComp, p) {
        frame += 1;
        z4ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 540, 320);
        z4ctx.fillStyle = '#f8fafc';
        z4ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 540, 320);

        const left = { x: 34, y: 60, w: 190, h: 210 };
        const right = { x: 300, y: 60, w: 190, h: 210 };
        const liqTop = left.y + liqComp * 20;
        const gasTop = right.y + gasComp * 1.9;

        drawChamber(left, liqTop, '#60a5fa', '#1d4ed8', 'Tekućina', 'velik E, mali ΔV');
        drawChamber(right, gasTop, '#fca5a5', '#dc2626', 'Plin', 'mali E, velik ΔV');

        liquidParticles.forEach((pt) => {
            pt.x += pt.vx;
            pt.y += pt.vy;
            if (pt.x < left.x + 10 || pt.x > left.x + left.w - 10) pt.vx *= -1;
            if (pt.y < liqTop + 12 || pt.y > left.y + left.h - 10) pt.vy *= -1;
            z4ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.85)';
            z4ctx.beginPath();
            z4ctx.arc(pt.x, pt.y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            z4ctx.fill();
        });

        gasParticles.forEach((pt) => {
            pt.x += pt.vx;
            pt.y += pt.vy;
            if (pt.x < right.x + 10 || pt.x > right.x + right.w - 10) pt.vx *= -1;
            if (pt.y < gasTop + 12 || pt.y > right.y + right.h - 10) pt.vy *= -1;
            z4ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(220, 38, 38, 0.75)';
            z4ctx.beginPath();
            z4ctx.arc(pt.x, pt.y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            z4ctx.fill();
        });

        drawPressureArrow(left.x + left.w / 2, 18, left.x + left.w / 2, liqTop - 6, '#2563eb', `p = ${p.toFixed(1)} MPa`);
        drawPressureArrow(right.x + right.w / 2, 18, right.x + right.w / 2, gasTop - 6, '#dc2626', `p = ${p.toFixed(1)} MPa`);

        requestAnimationFrame(updateZ4);
    }

    function drawChamber(box, topY, fillColor, accent, title, subtitle) {
        z4ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
        z4ctx.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';
        z4ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        z4ctx.strokeRect(box.x, box.y, box.w, box.h);

        z4ctx.fillStyle = fillColor;
        z4ctx.fillRect(box.x, topY, box.w, box.y + box.h - topY);

        z4ctx.fillStyle = '#334155';
        z4ctx.fillRect(box.x - 4, topY - 16, box.w + 8, 16);

        z4ctx.fillStyle = accent;
        z4ctx.font = 'bold 14px Inter';
        z4ctx.fillText(title, box.x + 10, box.y + box.h + 26);
        z4ctx.font = '12px Inter';
        z4ctx.fillStyle = '#64748b';
        z4ctx.fillText(subtitle, box.x + 10, box.y + box.h + 44);
    }

    function drawPressureArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
        const headlen = 10;
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        z4ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        z4ctx.fillStyle = color;
        z4ctx.lineWidth = 4;
        z4ctx.beginPath();
        z4ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
        z4ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
        z4ctx.stroke();
        z4ctx.beginPath();
        z4ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        z4ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        z4ctx.lineTo(x2 - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        z4ctx.closePath();
        z4ctx.fill();
        z4ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
        z4ctx.fillText(label, x1 - 34, y1 - 6);
    }

    z4pS.addEventListener('input', updateZ4);
    updateZ4();
})();
</script>
````


<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Zadatak 3 — Gustoća oceana na velikim dubinama {.unnumbered}

(2500 SPFM – 1.34) Na dubini od 7 km u oceanu tlak iznosi 71,6 MPa. Gustoća na površini
iznosi $\rho_0 = 1025\ \text{kg/m}^3$, pri čemu modul stlačivosti iznosi 2,34 GPa za dotični
raspon tlaka. Potrebno je odrediti gustoću fluida na dubini od 7 km i postotak promjene
gustoće fluida između površine i dubine od 7 km.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$h = 7000\ \text{m}$, $p_h = 71{,}6\ \text{MPa}$, $\rho_0 = 1025\ \text{kg/m}^3$, $E_0 = 2{,}34\ \text{GPa}$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$\rho_h$ i postotak promjene gustoće $\Delta\rho/\rho_0$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

1. **Porast gustoće** iz $E_0 = -\Delta p\,/\,(\Delta\rho/\rho_0)$:
$$\Delta\rho = \frac{\rho_0\,\Delta p}{E_0} = \frac{1025\cdot 71{,}6\cdot 10^6}{2{,}34\cdot 10^9} = 31{,}4\ \text{kg/m}^3$$
2. **Gustoća na dubini:**
$$\rho_h = \rho_0 + \Delta\rho = 1025 + 31{,}4 = 1056{,}4\ \text{kg/m}^3 \quad (+\,3{,}06\%)$$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

`
````{=html}
<div id="z5-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 30px auto; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; padding: 25px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1e293b; margin-top: 0; font-weight: 700;">Z5: Gustoća fluida na dubini oceana</h4>
    <div style="display: flex; gap: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
        <div style="flex: 1.5; min-width: 320px; position: relative; height: 350px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; background: #ffffff;">
            <div id="z5-ocean-bg" style="width: 100%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #38bdf8 0%, #0369a1 50%, #082f49 100%); position: relative;">
                <!-- Submarine -->
                <div id="z5-sub" style="position: absolute; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); top: 10%; font-size: 30px; transition: top 0.5s ease-out;">🚢</div>
                <!-- Depth line -->
                <div id="z5-depth-line" style="position: absolute; width: 100%; border-top: 1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.3); top: 10%; transition: top 0.5s;">
                    <span style="position: absolute; right: 10px; top: -15px; font-size: 10px; color: #ffffff;"><span id="z5-v-depth-val">0</span> m</span>
                </div>
                <!-- Molecular grid (using canvas for performance) -->
                <canvas id="z5-molecules" width="400" height="350" style="width: 100%; height: 100%; pointer-events: none;"></canvas>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 240px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px;">
            <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="font-weight: 600; color: #1e293b;">Dubina: <span id="z5-v-depth">0</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="z5-depth" min="0" max="10000" step="100" value="0" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #38bdf8;">
                <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; font-size:0.72rem; color:#64748b; margin-top:3px;"><span>0</span><span>10 000</span></div>
            </div>

            <div style="background: #eff6ff; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #0369a1;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #0369a1; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px;">PARAMETRI NA DUBINI:</div>
                <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.85rem;">
                    <div style="color: #475569;">Tlak:</div><div style="font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b;"><span id="z5-res-p">0.1</span> MPa</div>
                    <div style="color: #475569;">Gustoća:</div><div style="font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b;"><span id="z5-res-rho">1025</span> kg/m³</div>
                    <div style="color: #475569;">Porast ρ:</div><div id="z5-perc-badge" style="font-weight: 700; color: #166534;"><span id="z5-res-perc">0.00</span> %</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="background:#ffffff; padding:12px; border:1px solid #dbeafe; border-radius:10px;">
                <div style="font-size:0.74rem; font-weight:800; text-transform:uppercase; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:6px;">Graf: tlak i gustoća po dubini</div>
                <canvas id="z5-chart" width="340" height="180" style="width:100%; height:auto; display:block;"></canvas>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
Tlak u oceanu raste s dubinom i komprimira vodu. Na 7 km dubine gustoća je vidljivo veća nego na površini uslijed modula stlačivosti.
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const z5dS = document.getElementById('z5-depth');
    const z5sub = document.getElementById('z5-sub');
    const z5line = document.getElementById('z5-depth-line');
    const z5c = document.getElementById('z5-molecules');
    const z5ctx = z5c.getContext('2d');
    const z5chart = document.getElementById('z5-chart');
    const z5chartCtx = z5chart.getContext('2d');

    function updateZ5() {
        const d = parseFloat(z5dS.value);
        document.getElementById('z5-v-depth').innerText = d;
        document.getElementById('z5-v-depth-val').innerText = d;
        
        const p = 0.1 + (1025 * 9.81 * d / 1e6);
        const rho = 1025 * (1 + (p-0.1)/2340);
        const perc = ((rho/1025)-1)*100;
        
        document.getElementById('z5-res-p').innerText = p.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z5-res-rho').innerText = rho.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z5-res-perc').innerText = perc.toFixed(2);

        const yPerc = (d / 10000) * 80 + 10;
        z5sub.style.top = yPerc + "%";
        z5line.style.top = yPerc + "%";
        z5sub.innerText = d > 500 ? "🛸" : "🚢";

        const oceanTop = [56, 189, 248];
        const oceanBottom = [8, 47, 73];
        const tr = Math.min(d / 10000, 1);
        const r = Math.round(oceanTop[0] + (oceanBottom[0] - oceanTop[0]) * tr);
        const g = Math.round(oceanTop[1] + (oceanBottom[1] - oceanTop[1]) * tr);
        const b = Math.round(oceanTop[2] + (oceanBottom[2] - oceanTop[2]) * tr);
        document.getElementById('z5-ocean-bg').style.background = `linear-gradient(to bottom, rgb(${r},${g},${b}) 0%, #0369a1 50%, #082f49 100%)`;

        const badge = document.getElementById('z5-perc-badge');
        badge.style.color = perc < 1 ? '#166534' : (perc < 2 ? '#a16207' : '#b91c1c');

        // Draw molecular grid density
        z5ctx.clearRect(0,0,400,350);
        z5ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.3)";
        const step = Math.max(8, 20 - (perc * 2));
        for(let x=0; x<400; x+=step) {
            for(let y=0; y<350; y+=step) {
                z5ctx.fillRect(x, y, 2, 2);
            }
        }

        drawChart(d);
    }

    function drawChart(currentDepth) {
        const c = z5chartCtx;
        const w = z5chart.width;
        const h = z5chart.height;
        c.clearRect(0, 0, w, h);
        c.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
        c.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);

        const pArea = {l: 36, r: w - 28, t: 12, b: h - 26};
        c.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';
        c.beginPath();
        c.moveTo(pArea.l, pArea.t);
        c.lineTo(pArea.l, pArea.b);
        c.lineTo(pArea.r, pArea.b);
        c.stroke();

        c.fillStyle = '#64748b';
        c.font = '10px Inter';
        c.fillText('Dubina (m)', 4, 10);
        c.fillText('p (MPa)', pArea.r - 36, 10);
        c.fillText('rho (kg/m3)', pArea.r - 70, h - 6);

        const dMax = 10000;
        const dNow = Math.max(0, Math.min(currentDepth, dMax));
        const n = Math.max(2, Math.floor(dNow / 200));
        c.strokeStyle = '#1d4ed8';
        c.lineWidth = 2;
        c.beginPath();
        for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {
            const d = (i / n) * dNow;
            const p = 0.1 + (1025 * 9.81 * d / 1e6);
            const x = pArea.l + (d / dMax) * (pArea.r - pArea.l);
            const y = pArea.t + (p / 101) * (pArea.b - pArea.t);
            if (i === 0) c.moveTo(x, y); else c.lineTo(x, y);
        }
        c.stroke();

        c.strokeStyle = '#dc2626';
        c.lineWidth = 2;
        c.beginPath();
        for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {
            const d = (i / n) * dNow;
            const p = 0.1 + (1025 * 9.81 * d / 1e6);
            const rho = 1025 * (1 + (p - 0.1) / 2340);
            const x = pArea.l + (d / dMax) * (pArea.r - pArea.l);
            const y = pArea.b - ((rho - 1025) / 45) * (pArea.b - pArea.t);
            if (i === 0) c.moveTo(x, y); else c.lineTo(x, y);
        }
        c.stroke();

        const cx = pArea.l + (dNow / dMax) * (pArea.r - pArea.l);
        c.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
        c.setLineDash([4, 4]);
        c.beginPath();
        c.moveTo(cx, pArea.t);
        c.lineTo(cx, pArea.b);
        c.stroke();
        c.setLineDash([]);
    }
    z5dS.oninput = updateZ5; updateZ5();
})();
</script>
````

<br>


<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Zadatak 4 — Profil brzine u cijevi {.unnumbered}

(2500 SPFM – 1.69) Voda struji kroz cijev. Profil brzine u poprečnom presjeku zadan je
izrazom $v = \left(\frac{\beta}{4\mu}\right)\!\left(\frac{d^2}{4} - r^2\right)$, pri čemu je
$v$ — brzina ovisna o polumjeru $r$, $\beta$ — konstanta, $\mu$ — viskoznost, $d$ — promjer
cijevi, $r$ — radijalna udaljenost od osi. Odrediti tangencijalno naprezanje na stjenkama
cijevi. Odrediti tangencijalno naprezanje na polumjeru $r = d/4$. Ukoliko ukupna duljina
cijevi iznosi $L$, odrediti ukupnu tangencijalnu silu na stijenkama cijevi.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$v(r) = \tfrac{\beta}{4\mu}\!\left(\tfrac{d^2}{4} - r^2\right)$, duljina cijevi $L$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">a) $\tau_s$ pri $r = d/2$; b) $\tau_{d/4}$ pri $r = d/4$; c) ukupna tangencijalna sila $F_{\tau s}$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

1. **Gradijent brzine** derivacijom po $r$: $dv/dr = -\beta r/(2\mu)$
2. **Newtonov zakon** $\tau = \mu\,dv/dr$ daje opće naprezanje:
$$\tau(r) = -\frac{\beta r}{2}$$
3. **Naprezanje na stijenci** ($r = d/2$):
$$\tau_s = -\frac{\beta d}{4}$$
4. **Naprezanje na $r = d/4$:**
$$\tau_{d/4} = -\frac{\beta d}{8}$$
5. **Ukupna sila** na plaštu $A = \pi d L$:
$$F_{\tau s} = \tau_s \cdot \pi d L = -\frac{\beta d^2 \pi L}{4}$$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

`
````{=html}
<div id="z6-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; padding: 25px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1e293b; margin-top: 0; font-weight: 700;">Z6: Newtonov zakon viskoznosti (Poiseuilleov tok)</h4>
    
    <div style="position: relative; margin-bottom: 20px;">
        <canvas id="z6-main-canvas" width="800" height="320" style="width: 100%; height: 320px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; cursor: crosshair;"></canvas>
        <div id="z6-inspect-tooltip" style="position: absolute; display: none; background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.9); color: white; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 0.75rem; pointer-events: none; z-index: 10;">
            <b>Radijalni položaj:</b> <span id="z6-tt-r">0</span> mm<br>
            <b>Brzina v:</b> <span id="z6-tt-v">0</span> m/s<br>
            <b>Naprezanje τ:</b> <span id="z6-tt-tau">0</span> Pa
        </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 20px; background: #ffffff; padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
        <div>
            <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: 600; color: #475569;">Viskoznost (μ): <span id="z6-v-mu">1.0</span> mPa·s</label>
            <input type="range" id="z6-mu" min="1" max="50" step="1" value="10" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
        </div>
        <div>
            <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: 600; color: #475569;">Gradijent tlaka (β): <span id="z6-v-beta">100</span> Pa/m</label>
            <input type="range" id="z6-beta" min="10" max="500" step="10" value="100" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
        </div>
        <div>
            <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: 600; color: #475569;">Promjer (d): <span id="z6-v-d">100</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="z6-d" min="40" max="150" step="5" value="100" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
        </div>
        <div>
            <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: 600; color: #475569;">Duljina cijevi (L): <span id="z6-v-l">2.0</span> m</label>
            <input type="range" id="z6-l" min="0.5" max="10" step="0.5" value="2" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
        </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; margin-top: 15px;">
        <div style="background: #fee2e2; border: 1px solid #fecaca; padding: 14px;">
            <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; color: #b91c1c; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Naprezanje na stijenci</div>
            <div style="font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: 800; color: #991b1b;"><span id="z6-res-tau-wall">2.50</span> Pa</div>
            <div style="font-size: 0.78rem; color: #7f1d1d;">tau_s = beta d / 4</div>
        </div>
        <div style="background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fed7aa; padding: 14px;">
            <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; color: #c2410c; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Naprezanje na r = d/4</div>
            <div style="font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: 800; color: #9a3412;"><span id="z6-res-tau-quarter">1.25</span> Pa</div>
            <div style="font-size: 0.78rem; color: #9a3412;">tau_d/4 = beta d / 8</div>
        </div>
        <div style="background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; padding: 14px;">
            <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1d4ed8; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Ukupna sila na stijenci</div>
            <div style="font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: 800; color: #1e40af;"><span id="z6-res-force-wall">1.57</span> N</div>
            <div style="font-size: 0.78rem; color: #1e3a8a;">F_tau = tau_s pi d L</div>
        </div>
        <div style="background: #ecfeff; border: 1px solid #a5f3fc; padding: 14px;">
            <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; color: #0f766e; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Maksimalna brzina na osi</div>
            <div style="font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: 800; color: #115e59;"><span id="z6-res-vmax">1.56</span> m/s</div>
            <div style="font-size: 0.78rem; color: #134e4a;">v_max u središtu presjeka</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div style="margin-top:12px; background:#ffffff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:12px; padding:10px 12px; overflow-x:auto;">
        <table style="width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; font-size:0.82rem; color:#334155;">
            <thead>
                <tr style="text-align:left; border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                    <th style="padding:6px 4px;">Veličina</th>
                    <th style="padding:6px 4px;">Vrijednost</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                <tr><td style="padding:6px 4px;">$\tau(r=0)$</td><td style="padding:6px 4px;"><span id="z6-res-tau-center">0.00</span> Pa</td></tr>
                <tr><td style="padding:6px 4px;">$\tau(r=d/4)$</td><td style="padding:6px 4px;"><span id="z6-res-tau-quarter-tbl">1.25</span> Pa</td></tr>
                <tr><td style="padding:6px 4px;">$\tau(r=d/2)$</td><td style="padding:6px 4px;"><span id="z6-res-tau-wall-tbl">2.50</span> Pa</td></tr>
                <tr><td style="padding:6px 4px;">$v_{max}$</td><td style="padding:6px 4px;"><span id="z6-res-vmax-tbl">1.56</span> m/s</td></tr>
                <tr><td style="padding:6px 4px;">$F_{total}$</td><td style="padding:6px 4px;"><span id="z6-res-force-wall-tbl">1.57</span> N</td></tr>
            </tbody>
        </table>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
Klikni bilo gdje na cijev da bi istražio profil brzine i tangencijalno naprezanje. Uoči da je $\tau$ najveći na stijenci (crveno), a nula na osi (zeleno).
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z6-main-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const muS = document.getElementById('z6-mu');
    const betaS = document.getElementById('z6-beta');
    const dS = document.getElementById('z6-d');
    const lS = document.getElementById('z6-l');
    const tooltip = document.getElementById('z6-inspect-tooltip');

    let particles = Array.from({length: 70}, () => ({
        x: Math.random(),
        y: Math.random() * 2 - 1,
        size: 1.8 + Math.random() * 1.6
    }));
    let mousePos = null;
    let dragMode = false;
    let probeYRatio = null;
    let frame = 0;

    canvas.onmousemove = (e) => {
        const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
        mousePos = { x: e.clientX - rect.left, y: e.clientY - rect.top };
        if (dragMode && probeYRatio !== null) {
            probeYRatio = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, mousePos.y / rect.height));
        }
    };
    canvas.onmouseleave = () => { mousePos = null; tooltip.style.display = 'none'; };
    canvas.onmousedown = (e) => {
        const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
        dragMode = true;
        probeYRatio = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height));
    };
    window.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
        dragMode = false;
    });

    function clamp(value, min, max) {
        return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, value));
    }

    function panel(ctx, x, y, w, h, title, accent) {
        ctx.fillStyle = "#ffffff";
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#dbeafe";
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
        roundRect(ctx, x, y, w, h, 16, true, true);
        ctx.fillStyle = accent;
        ctx.font = "600 13px Inter";
        ctx.fillText(title, x + 14, y + 24);
    }

    function roundRect(ctx, x, y, w, h, r, fill, stroke) {
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x + r, y);
        ctx.arcTo(x + w, y, x + w, y + h, r);
        ctx.arcTo(x + w, y + h, x, y + h, r);
        ctx.arcTo(x, y + h, x, y, r);
        ctx.arcTo(x, y, x + w, y, r);
        ctx.closePath();
        if (fill) ctx.fill();
        if (stroke) ctx.stroke();
    }

    function drawArrow(ctx, x1, y1, x2, y2, color, width = 2) {
        const headlen = 8;
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2-y1, x2-x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.fillStyle = color;
        ctx.lineWidth = width;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
        ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle-Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle-Math.PI/6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle+Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle+Math.PI/6));
        ctx.fill();
    }

    function draw() {
        frame += 1;
        const mu = parseFloat(muS.value) / 1000;
        const beta = parseFloat(betaS.value);
        const d_mm = parseFloat(dS.value);
        const L = parseFloat(lS.value);
        const R = d_mm / 2;
        const d_m = d_mm / 1000;
        const tauWall = beta * d_m / 4;
        const tauQuarter = beta * d_m / 8;
        const v_max = (beta * d_m * d_m) / (16 * mu);
        const F_tau = tauWall * Math.PI * d_m * L;

        document.getElementById('z6-v-mu').innerText = (mu*1000).toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('z6-v-beta').innerText = beta;
        document.getElementById('z6-v-d').innerText = d_mm;
        document.getElementById('z6-v-l').innerText = L.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z6-res-tau-wall').innerText = tauWall.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z6-res-tau-quarter').innerText = tauQuarter.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z6-res-force-wall').innerText = F_tau.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z6-res-vmax').innerText = v_max.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z6-res-tau-center').innerText = '0.00';
        document.getElementById('z6-res-tau-quarter-tbl').innerText = tauQuarter.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z6-res-tau-wall-tbl').innerText = tauWall.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z6-res-vmax-tbl').innerText = v_max.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z6-res-force-wall-tbl').innerText = F_tau.toFixed(2);

        const w = canvas.width;
        const h = canvas.height;
        const left = { x: 24, y: 22, w: 318, h: 276 };
        const right = { x: 366, y: 22, w: 410, h: 276 };
        const channel = {
            x: left.x + 26,
            y: left.y + 46,
            w: left.w - 52,
            h: left.h - 88
        };
        const cy = channel.y + channel.h / 2;
        const drawR = Math.min(channel.h * 0.43, 92);
        const topWall = cy - drawR;
        const bottomWall = cy + drawR;
        const chart = {
            x: right.x + 54,
            y: right.y + 34,
            w: right.w - 88,
            h: right.h - 68
        };

        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h);

        const bgGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, h);
        bgGrad.addColorStop(0, "#f8fbff");
        bgGrad.addColorStop(1, "#eef6ff");
        ctx.fillStyle = bgGrad;
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);

        panel(ctx, left.x, left.y, left.w, left.h, "Tok u cijevi", "#0f766e");
        panel(ctx, right.x, right.y, right.w, right.h, "Profil brzine v(r)", "#1d4ed8");

        // Left panel: channel
        const fluidGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(channel.x, topWall, channel.x, bottomWall);
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(0, "rgba(191, 219, 254, 0.55)");
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(0.5, "rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.18)");
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(1, "rgba(191, 219, 254, 0.55)");
        ctx.fillStyle = fluidGrad;
        roundRect(ctx, channel.x, topWall, channel.w, bottomWall - topWall, 18, true, false);

        ctx.fillStyle = "#334155";
        ctx.fillRect(channel.x, topWall - 12, channel.w, 10);
        ctx.fillRect(channel.x, bottomWall + 2, channel.w, 10);

        ctx.strokeStyle = "#94a3b8";
        ctx.lineWidth = 1;
        ctx.setLineDash([6, 6]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(channel.x, cy);
        ctx.lineTo(channel.x + channel.w, cy);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        ctx.font = "12px Inter";
        ctx.fillStyle = "#475569";
        ctx.fillText("os cijevi", channel.x + 6, cy - 8);
        ctx.fillText("stijenka", channel.x + 6, topWall - 16);
        ctx.fillText("stijenka", channel.x + 6, bottomWall + 28);

        // Layer arrows
        for (let i = 0; i <= 8; i++) {
            const y = topWall + (i / 8) * (bottomWall - topWall);
            const r_mm = ((y - cy) / drawR) * R;
            const v = Math.max(0, (beta / (4 * mu)) * ((d_mm/2000)**2 - (r_mm/1000)**2));
            const len = clamp((v / Math.max(v_max, 1e-6)) * 120, 8, 120);
            const alpha = 0.2 + 0.55 * (v / Math.max(v_max, 1e-6));
            drawArrow(ctx, channel.x + 18, y, channel.x + 18 + len, y, `rgba(37, 99, 235, ${alpha})`, 2.5);
        }

        // Particles
        particles.forEach((p) => {
            const r_mm = p.y * R;
            const v = Math.max(0, (beta / (4 * mu)) * ((d_mm/2000)**2 - (r_mm/1000)**2));
            const speedRatio = v / Math.max(v_max, 1e-6);
            p.x += 0.003 + speedRatio * 0.018;
            if (p.x > 1.05) p.x = -0.05;
            const px = channel.x + p.x * channel.w;
            const py = cy + p.y * drawR;
            ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(14, 116, 144, ${0.25 + 0.6 * speedRatio})`;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(px, py, p.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        });

        // Small formula badge
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(255,255,255,0.92)";
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#dbeafe";
        roundRect(ctx, channel.x + channel.w - 150, topWall + 14, 136, 34, 10, true, true);
        ctx.fillStyle = "#1e40af";
        ctx.font = "600 12px Inter";
        ctx.fillText("v(r) = vmax (1 - (r/R)^2)", channel.x + channel.w - 140, topWall + 36);

        // Right panel: chart axes
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#94a3b8";
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.2;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(chart.x, chart.y);
        ctx.lineTo(chart.x, chart.y + chart.h);
        ctx.lineTo(chart.x + chart.w, chart.y + chart.h);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.setLineDash([4, 6]);
        for (let i = 0; i <= 4; i++) {
            const gy = chart.y + (i / 4) * chart.h;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(chart.x, gy);
            ctx.lineTo(chart.x + chart.w, gy);
            ctx.stroke();
        }
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        ctx.font = "11px Inter";
        ctx.fillStyle = "#64748b";
        ctx.fillText("+R", chart.x - 24, chart.y + 4);
        ctx.fillText("0", chart.x - 16, chart.y + chart.h / 2 + 4);
        ctx.fillText("-R", chart.x - 24, chart.y + chart.h);
        ctx.fillText("r", chart.x - 10, chart.y - 8);
        ctx.fillText("v", chart.x + chart.w + 8, chart.y + chart.h + 4);

        // Profile fill and curve
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(chart.x, chart.y);
        for (let i = 0; i <= 120; i++) {
            const t = i / 120;
            const r_mm = R - 2 * R * t;
            const v = Math.max(0, (beta / (4 * mu)) * ((d_mm/2000)**2 - (r_mm/1000)**2));
            const px = chart.x + (v / Math.max(v_max, 1e-6)) * (chart.w - 12);
            const py = chart.y + t * chart.h;
            ctx.lineTo(px, py);
        }
        ctx.lineTo(chart.x, chart.y + chart.h);
        ctx.closePath();
        const chartFill = ctx.createLinearGradient(chart.x, chart.y, chart.x + chart.w, chart.y);
        chartFill.addColorStop(0, "rgba(191, 219, 254, 0.15)");
        chartFill.addColorStop(1, "rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.32)");
        ctx.fillStyle = chartFill;
        ctx.fill();

        ctx.strokeStyle = "#2563eb";
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath();
        for (let i = 0; i <= 120; i++) {
            const t = i / 120;
            const r_mm = R - 2 * R * t;
            const v = Math.max(0, (beta / (4 * mu)) * ((d_mm/2000)**2 - (r_mm/1000)**2));
            const px = chart.x + (v / Math.max(v_max, 1e-6)) * (chart.w - 12);
            const py = chart.y + t * chart.h;
            if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(px, py);
            else ctx.lineTo(px, py);
        }
        ctx.stroke();

        // Centerline and wall stress bars
        ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.9)";
        ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(chart.x, chart.y + chart.h / 2);
        ctx.lineTo(chart.x + chart.w, chart.y + chart.h / 2);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        const stressBarW = clamp(16 + tauWall * 10, 16, 74);
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.18)";
        ctx.fillRect(chart.x + chart.w - stressBarW, chart.y, stressBarW, 12);
        ctx.fillRect(chart.x + chart.w - stressBarW, chart.y + chart.h - 12, stressBarW, 12);
        ctx.fillStyle = "#b91c1c";
        ctx.font = "600 11px Inter";
        ctx.fillText("visoko tau", chart.x + chart.w - stressBarW - 58, chart.y + 10);
        ctx.fillText("visoko tau", chart.x + chart.w - stressBarW - 58, chart.y + chart.h - 2);

        // Interactive highlight by radial position
        const probeY = probeYRatio === null ? (mousePos ? mousePos.y : null) : (probeYRatio * h);
        if (probeY !== null && probeY >= topWall && probeY <= bottomWall) {
            const r_inspect_mm = ((probeY - cy) / drawR) * R;
            const r_m = r_inspect_mm / 1000;
            const v = Math.max(0, (beta / (4 * mu)) * ((d_mm/2000)**2 - r_m**2));
            const tau = Math.abs(beta * r_m / 2);
            const inspectYChart = chart.y + ((R - r_inspect_mm) / (2 * R)) * chart.h;
            const inspectXChart = chart.x + (v / Math.max(v_max, 1e-6)) * (chart.w - 12);

            tooltip.style.display = 'block';
            tooltip.style.left = ((mousePos ? mousePos.x : chart.x) + 15) + 'px';
            tooltip.style.top = (probeY + 15) + 'px';
            document.getElementById('z6-tt-r').innerText = r_inspect_mm.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z6-tt-v').innerText = v.toFixed(3);
            document.getElementById('z6-tt-tau').innerText = tau.toFixed(2);

            ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.42)";
            ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]);
````
