````{=html}
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(channel.x, probeY);
            ctx.lineTo(chart.x + chart.w, probeY);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);

            ctx.fillStyle = "#ef4444";
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(channel.x + 14, probeY, 4.5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(inspectXChart, inspectYChart, 5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();

            drawArrow(ctx, channel.x + channel.w - 86, probeY, channel.x + channel.w - 86 + Math.min(58, 14 + tau * 9), probeY, "#ef4444", 2.5);
        } else {
            tooltip.style.display = 'none';
        }

        // Bottom legends
        ctx.fillStyle = "#64748b";
        ctx.font = "12px Inter";
        ctx.fillText("sporije uz stijenku", channel.x, left.y + left.h - 18);
        ctx.fillText("najbrže na osi", channel.x + channel.w - 92, left.y + left.h - 18);
        ctx.fillText("parabolični profil", chart.x, right.y + right.h - 14);
        ctx.fillText("tau raste prema stijenci", chart.x + chart.w - 138, right.y + right.h - 14);

        requestAnimationFrame(draw);
    }

    draw();
})();
</script>
````

<br>


<hr class="zadatak-sep">

### Zadatak 5 — Blok na kosini {.unnumbered}

(2500 SPFM – 1.71) Blok kvadratnog presjeka težine 1,1 kN, duljine bridova 250 mm klizi
kosinom koja s horizontalnom osi zatvara kut od 20° po sloju ulja debljine 6 μm. Ukoliko
pretpostavimo linearan profil brzine i konstantnu debljinu sloja ulja, potrebno je odrediti
ustaljenu brzinu bloka. Dinamička viskoznost ulja iznosi 7 mPa·s.

<div class="zadano-grid">
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Zadano</span>
<span class="zadano-text">$G = 1100\ \text{N}$, $a = 0{,}25\ \text{m}$, $\alpha = 20°$, $\delta_u = 6\cdot 10^{-6}\ \text{m}$, $\mu = 0{,}007\ \text{Pa\,s}$</span>
</div>
<div class="zadano-row">
<span class="label">Odrediti</span>
<span class="zadano-text">ustaljena brzina klizanja $v_B$</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="rjesenje-label">Rješenje</div>

1. **Tangencijalna komponenta težine** (vuče blok niz kosinu):
$$F_\tau = G\sin\alpha = 1100\cdot\sin 20° = 376\ \text{N}$$
2. **Ravnoteža sila:** viskozna sila $F_v = \mu\,(v_B/\delta_u)\cdot a^2$ jednaka je $F_\tau$
3. **Brzina bloka:**
$$v_B = \frac{F_\tau\,\delta_u}{\mu\,a^2} = \frac{376\cdot 6\cdot 10^{-6}}{0{,}007\cdot 0{,}25^2} = 5{,}16\ \text{m/s}$$

<hr class="widget-sep">
<div class="widget-label">⚙ Interaktivni simulator</div>

`
````{=html}
<div id="z7-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; padding: 25px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1e293b; margin-top: 0; font-weight: 700;">Z7: Blok na kosini s uljnim filmom</h4>
    <div style="display: flex; gap: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
        <div style="flex: 1.5; min-width: 320px; position: relative; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; height: 300px; overflow: hidden;">
            <canvas id="z7-canvas" width="500" height="300" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            <div style="position: absolute; top: 10px; right: 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #cbd5e0; font-size: 0.7rem;">
                <b>Zoom na sloj ulja (δ):</b><br>
                <canvas id="z7-zoom-canvas" width="100" height="60" style="width: 100px; height: 60px; background: #f0f9ff; border: 1px solid #bae6fd;"></canvas>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 240px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; font-size: 0.85rem;">
            <div style="background: white; padding: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="font-weight: 600; color: #475569;">Kut α: <span id="z7-v-alpha">20</span>°</label>
                <input type="range" id="z7-alpha" min="5" max="45" step="1" value="20" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
                <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:0.72rem;color:#64748b;margin:2px 0 8px;"><span>5°</span><span>45°</span></div>
                <label style="font-weight: 600; margin-top: 10px; display: block; color: #475569;">Viskoznost μ: <span id="z7-v-mu">7</span> mPa·s</label>
                <input type="range" id="z7-mu" min="1" max="50" step="1" value="7" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
                <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:0.72rem;color:#64748b;margin:2px 0 8px;"><span>1</span><span>50</span></div>
                <label style="font-weight: 600; margin-top: 10px; display: block; color: #475569;">Sloj ulja δ: <span id="z7-v-delta">6</span> μm</label>
                <input type="range" id="z7-delta" min="1" max="50" step="1" value="6" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
                <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:0.72rem;color:#64748b;margin-top:2px;"><span>1 μm</span><span>50 μm</span></div>
            </div>
            <div style="background: #f0fdf4; padding: 12px; border: 1px solid #bbf7d0;">
                <div style="font-weight: 700; color: #166534; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 0.7rem; margin-bottom: 4px;">Ustaljena brzina v_B</div>
                <div style="font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; color: #166534;"><span id="z7-res-v">5.16</span> m/s</div>
            </div>

            <div style="background:#ffffff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:10px; padding:10px 12px;">
                <div style="font-size:0.72rem; font-weight:800; color:#64748b; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:8px;">Balans sila na kosini</div>
                <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; font-size:0.78rem; color:#b91c1c;"><span>$F_{tang}=G\sin\alpha$</span><strong><span id="z7-res-fg">376.2</span> N</strong></div>
                <div style="height:10px; border-radius:999px; background:#e2e8f0; overflow:hidden; margin:3px 0 8px;"><div id="z7-bar-fg" style="height:100%; width:100%; background:linear-gradient(90deg,#fca5a5,#ef4444);"></div></div>
                <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; font-size:0.78rem; color:#1d4ed8;"><span>$F_v=\mu(v/\delta)a^2$</span><strong><span id="z7-res-fv">376.2</span> N</strong></div>
                <div style="height:10px; border-radius:999px; background:#e2e8f0; overflow:hidden;"><div id="z7-bar-fv" style="height:100%; width:100%; background:linear-gradient(90deg,#93c5fd,#2563eb);"></div></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="fizikalni-uvid">
Sila teže vuče blok niz kosinu, dok viskozno trenje u tankom sloju ulja pruža otpor. Ravnoteža tih sila određuje konstantnu brzinu gibanja.
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const z7c = document.getElementById('z7-canvas'); const z7ctx = z7c.getContext('2d');
    const z7zc = document.getElementById('z7-zoom-canvas'); const z7zctx = z7zc.getContext('2d');
    const z7aS = document.getElementById('z7-alpha'); const z7mS = document.getElementById('z7-mu'); const z7dS = document.getElementById('z7-delta');

    let z7Pos = 0;
    function updateZ7() {
        const alpha = parseFloat(z7aS.value) * Math.PI / 180;
        const mu = parseFloat(z7mS.value) / 1000;
        const delta = parseFloat(z7dS.value) / 1e6;
        const G = 1100; const side = 0.25;
        const Ft = G * Math.sin(alpha);
        const v = (Ft * delta) / (mu * side * side);
        const Fv = mu * (v / delta) * side * side;
        document.getElementById('z7-v-alpha').innerText = z7aS.value;
        document.getElementById('z7-v-mu').innerText = z7mS.value;
        document.getElementById('z7-v-delta').innerText = z7dS.value;
        document.getElementById('z7-res-v').innerText = v.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z7-res-fg').innerText = Ft.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z7-res-fv').innerText = Fv.toFixed(1);

        const refF = Math.max(Ft, Fv, 1);
        document.getElementById('z7-bar-fg').style.width = `${(Ft / refF * 100).toFixed(1)}%`;
        document.getElementById('z7-bar-fv').style.width = `${(Fv / refF * 100).toFixed(1)}%`;

        z7Pos += v * 0.5; if(z7Pos > 600) z7Pos = -100;
        z7ctx.clearRect(0,0,500,300);
        z7ctx.save();
        z7ctx.translate(0, 50);
        z7ctx.rotate(alpha);
        z7ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(49, 130, 206, 0.3)";
        z7ctx.fillRect(-100, 0, 700, 5);
        z7ctx.fillStyle = "#475569";
        z7ctx.fillRect(z7Pos, -40, 60, 40);
        const cx = z7Pos + 30, cy = -20;
        drawArrow(z7ctx, cx, cy, cx + 40, cy + 14, "#ef4444", "Gsinα");
        drawArrow(z7ctx, cx, cy, cx - 40, cy - 14, "#2563eb", "Fv");
        z7ctx.restore();
        z7zctx.clearRect(0,0,100,60);
        z7zctx.fillStyle = "rgba(49, 130, 206, 0.4)";
        z7zctx.fillRect(0, 10, 100, 40);
        for (let i = 0; i <= 4; i++) {
            const t = i / 4;
            const y = 50 - t * 36;
            const len = 10 + t * Math.min(v * 6, 70);
            z7zctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(37, 99, 235, ${0.35 + 0.15 * i})`;
            z7zctx.lineWidth = 2;
            z7zctx.beginPath();
            z7zctx.moveTo(8, y);
            z7zctx.lineTo(8 + len, y);
            z7zctx.stroke();
        }
        z7zctx.fillStyle = "#1e293b"; z7zctx.fillRect(0, 0, 100, 10); 
        z7zctx.fillRect(0, 50, 100, 10); 
        z7zctx.fillStyle = '#334155';
        z7zctx.font = '9px Inter';
        z7zctx.fillText('v=0', 72, 58);
        z7zctx.fillText('vB', 72, 12);
        requestAnimationFrame(updateZ7);
    }
    function drawArrow(ctx, x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
        const headlen = 10; const angle = Math.atan2(y2-y1, x2-x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle-Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle-Math.PI/6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle+Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle+Math.PI/6));
        ctx.fill();
        if(label) { ctx.font="bold 10px Inter"; ctx.fillText(label, x2+5, y2+5); }
    }
    [z7aS, z7mS, z7dS].forEach(s => s.oninput = updateZ7); updateZ7();
})();
</script>
````

<br>
